description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The back panel is a vibrant blue color, featuring a dual camera module and a flash arranged vertically in the top left corner, along with a fingerprint sensor centrally located below the cameras. The front is dominated by a large, black, glossy screen with no visible buttons or notches, suggesting a full touchscreen interface. The left and right edges are slim, with one side showing a SIM card tray and the other side featuring elongated button slots, likely for volume and power controls. The phone's body appears to be made of plastic or polycarbonate with a smooth, hard finish. There are no visible brand logos or external cases present.
description: A blue, modern mobile phone with a dual rear camera, fingerprint sensor, and a large black touchscreen front. The device has a smooth, hard plastic body and minimalistic side buttons.
description_view_0: The back view shows a blue panel with a dual camera and flash in the top left, and a fingerprint sensor in the center.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals a slim profile with a visible SIM card tray slot.
description_view_2: The front view displays a large, black, glossy screen with no visible buttons or notches.
description_view_3: The right edge view shows a slim profile with elongated button slots, likely for volume and power.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is either turned off or in standby mode with no visible content.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: There are elongated button slots on the right edge, likely for volume and power, and a SIM card tray slot on the left edge.
